"Hey Champ!" is a special series by CGTN for Paris 2024, where CGTN invites Olympic champions from all disciplines to visit schools and local communities in China, have some fun with sports enthusiasts and reflect on their Olympic experience.

In this episode, CGTN takes two-time Olympic gold medalist in gymnastics Deng Linlin to Zheshan Park in Wuhu, east China's Anhui Province, on a weekday morning. How do locals exercise in the morning? Did they impress China's "queen of the beam"? After over a decade, how does Deng recall her Olympic experience? Let's find out.
